name: Betty's Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, sugar) with butter until crumbly.
2. Make a well in the center and add remaining ingredients: soda, vanilla extract, almond extract, lemon extract, eggs, and buttermilk or milk.
3. Chill mixture in refrigerator for at least 3 hours or overnight.
4. Roll out dough to 1/4 inch thick and cut with favorite cookie cutter.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes on a greased cookie sheet.
6. If desired, add food coloring to the wet ingredients before chilling.
7. Cool completely and frost as desired.
